channel.title: Urban Climate Research Digest
channel.description: 都市気候の最新論文（批判的Q&A）と政策・ニュース動向を、日本語でお届けする自動生成ポッドキャスト。
channel.itunes:author: sy4232

item.title: 🎓 論文Q&A｜2026-06-29：Spatiotemporal Patterns and Energy ほか2本
item.description: 批判的な質疑応答で読み解く今回の論文： ・[新着] Spatiotemporal Patterns and Energy Consumption Effects of Urban Heat Island Intensity: A Study of 216 Cities Across Five Major Climatic Zones in China ・[新着] Reassessing Urban Heat Island Intensity Using Vegetation-Based References in a Semi-Arid City: The Case of Diyarbakır ・[新着] Mortality modeling for short-term climate stress test in France: impact of extreme heat

item.description: 今日の都市気候・政策ウォッチ： ・VPP using residential batteries, smart thermostats could ease data center grid crunch, developers say（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News）

item.title: 🏛️ 政策ウォッチ｜2026-06-25：Climate migration is coming. Cincinnati ほか

item.description: 今日の都市気候・政策ウォッチ： ・Virginia approves 6-year, $28.5B infrastructure plan（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・As a Maryland city mulls upzoning, a Realtor association study touts its benefits（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・7 takeaways from Harvard’s 2026 state of housing report（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・Lyft charting a path toward more walkable, connected cities（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・Biking in US cities is getting better, 2026 report says（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News）

item.title: 🏛️ 政策ウォッチ｜2026-06-22：Le notti tropicali sono il volto nascost ほか
item.description: 今日の都市気候・政策ウォッチ： ・Le notti tropicali sono il volto nascosto della crisi climatica : perché il caldo non finisce quando tramonta il sole（greenme.it） ・Bihar plans green zones , tree plantation at hospitals for heat reduction（hindustantimes.com） ・Quebec town of Terrasse - Vaudreuil recognizes trees as living beings with rights（cp24.com, kelownadailycourier.ca, medicinehatnews.com, niaga） ・La région Auvergne - Rhône - Alpes en vigilance orange canicule（lyoncapitale.fr, newsday.com, sudouest.fr） ・Şehirlerdeki betonlaşma solunum hastalarını tehdit ediyor（haberyazar.com）
